meta.title: DEF CON 33 - BiC Village - Following Threat Actors  Rhythm to Give Them More Blues - Malachi Walker
meta.description: This session introduces Domain Intelligence Analysis: using DNS artifacts to improve threat detection and response before domains become public IOCs.
